headline: HPE Private Cloud AI Win With Sky Highlights On Premises AI Strategy
summary: Sky Co., Ltd. has deployed HPE Private Cloud AI from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE), an on premises AI infrastructure solution co developed with NVIDIA. The deployment enables large scale AI adoption under strict data governance and supports use of sensitive data. The project was completed in about one month, highlighting rapid implementation for an enterprise grade AI environment. Hewlett Packard Enterprise sits at the intersection of traditional IT infrastructure and AI focused...

headline: Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) Is Down 6.7% After Nvidia AI MGX Showcase Tie‑In And $500M ATM Plan
summary: In recent days, Navitas Semiconductor announced a new ultra‑high‑voltage UHV‑TO‑247‑4‑ISO SiC package, filed an omnibus shelf registration and a US$500 million at‑the‑market equity program, participated in Nvidia’s AI Factory MGX showcase at COMPUTEX 2026, and saw director Dr. Ranbir Singh resign from the board effective June 9, 2026. These events collectively highlight Navitas’ push to deepen its role in AI data‑center and high‑voltage energy infrastructure while potentially increasing its...
